underlying_goal: Check git status, commit and push all changes, then verify and address a feedback report about frontend-backend alignment issues (P0 blockers and gaps)
friction_detail: User interrupted Claude while it was exiting plan mode, suggesting the planning output or approach wasn't what they wanted at that moment.
brief_summary: User wanted to commit/push changes and then address feedback about P0 blockers in their project; git push succeeded but the planning phase for fixes was interrupted by the user.
